concerns.text: T010 implements checksums in src/data/checksums.yaml but Constitution III requires checksums recorded in state/projects/PROJ-573-https-arxiv-org-abs-2604-27351.yaml artifact_hashes map. Path mismatch violates Single Source of Truth principle.

FR-014 requires Wilcoxon signed-rank test with effect sizes and 95% CI as PRIMARY outcome alongside paired t-test. T019 implements statistical tests but doesn't verify effect size calculation or primary outcome designation in deliverable.
FR-007 requires report to include (a) paired-t statistic, (b) p-value, AND (c) bootstrap CI (1000 resamples). T020 (report generator) doesn't verify all three outputs are included in deliverable.
FR-005 requires logging 'random seeds, model versions, AND environment details'. T024 covers seed/version logging but environment details logging is not explicitly addressed in task description.

SC-004 requires reproducibility across 5 seeds with 'mean accuracy differences fall within a 95% CI (statistical equivalence)'. T050 verifies reproducibility but doesn't define acceptable CI width or acceptance criteria.

Model size constraints (< 1 GB) are referenced in tasks but verification of actual model weights is only mentioned in Phase 0.5 research. No explicit task to validate weights before implementation, risking SC-002/SC-003 violations.
